creator: cjk32@cam.ac.uk
text:
New port: www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz
MusicBrainz is a community music metadatabase.  This ports provides access to the API.


# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz
#	www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/pkg-plist
#	www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/pkg-descr
#	www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/Makefile
#	www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/distinfo
#
echo c - www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz
mkdir -p www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/pkg-plist << 'END-of-www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/pkg-plist'

sed 's/^X//' >www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/pkg-descr << 'END-of-www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/pkg-descr'
XThis is a Perl interface to the MusicBrainz API.
X
XWWW:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/WebService-MusicBrainz/
END-of-www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/pkg-descr
echo x - www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/Makefile << 'END-of-www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	p5-WebService-MusicBrainz
X# Date created:		2009-01-19
X# Whom:			Christopher Key <cjk32@cam.ac.uk>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	WebService-MusicBrainz
XPORTVERSION=	0.20
XCATEGORIES=	www perl5
XMASTER_SITES=	CPAN
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
X
XMAINTAINER=	cjk32@cam.ac.uk
XCOMMENT=	Perl interface to MusicBrainz
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Class-Accessor>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Class-Accessor \
X		p5-libwww>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww \
X		p5-URI>=0:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-URI \
X		p5-XML-LibXML>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-LibXML
XRUN_DEPENDS=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
X
XPERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
X
XMAN3=		WebService::MusicBrainz.3 \

X		WebService::MusicBrainz::Response::Label.3 \
X		WebService::MusicBrainz::Response::LabelList.3 \
X		WebService::MusicBrainz::Response::Metadata.3 \
X		WebService::MusicBrainz::Response::Puid.3 \
X		WebService::MusicBrainz::Response::PuidList.3 \
X		WebService::MusicBrainz::Response::Relation.3 \
X		WebService::MusicBrainz::Response::RelationList.3 \
X		WebService::MusicBrainz::Response::Release.3 \
X		WebService::MusicBrainz::Response::ReleaseList.3 \
X		WebService::MusicBrainz::Response::ReleaseEvent.3 \
X		WebService::MusicBrainz::Response::ReleaseEventList.3 \
X		WebService::MusicBrainz::Response::Tag.3 \
X		WebService::MusicBrainz::Response::TagList.3 \
X		WebService::MusicBrainz::Response::Track.3 \
X		WebService::MusicBrainz::Response::TrackList.3
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/Makefile
echo x - www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/distinfo << 'END-of-www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/distinfo'
